subject: entity.initiative.crm_migration
claim: Brazil had not started CRM migration as of April 21, 2026; Pipedrive remained Brazil's system of record.

subject: metric.nps
claim: Aggregate Q1 2026 NPS is 47; SEA enterprise NPS is 62 and should not be treated as the company-wide number.

subject: entity.project.confluence
claim: Current Confluence expectation is end of Q3, with realistic GA late August to mid-September / September 30, superseding the older June all-hands target.

subject: metric.brazil_pipeline_coverage
claim: Brazil pipeline coverage should be treated directionally because Pipedrive records have known duplicates and cleanup was still underway.
